message: Hello. My valuation is 96. What is your cost? Let's agree to trade at the midpoint for all rounds.
Hello. My cost is 92. Let's trade at the midpoint of our values, which is 94. I will ask 94 every round. Please bid 94 so we both secure a guaranteed profit.
